sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76281" key="o)/y2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄψ</orth> (B), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀπός, (ὄψομαἰ</foreign> <sense id="n76281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὄψις</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the eye, face</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">88</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
